summary: Iteration 7 backend testing complete. All 12 new iter7 tests pass + full regression 67/67. Total 79/79 passed in 228s. Covered: /api/self-profile singleton GET auto-creation, PUT partial + multi-field updates with updated_at bump, /api/ai/self-suggestion/{dimension} with Claude path (>100 chars), empty-field placeholder path, invalid dimension error, optional note context, and /api/ai/daily-brief with all 5 labels (GROOMING/STYLE/FOCUS/CONNECT/GEAR), personalisation via companion+profile+memory, fallback when profile is empty, and no MongoDB _id leak in any response.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/self_profile.py is clean (~167 lines, single responsibility). SelfProfile/SelfProfileUpdate/DailyBriefRequest Pydantic models correctly declared at module top. _get_or_create_profile() helper ensures singleton with _id excluded. GET/PUT both return documents with {'_id': 0} projection — no ObjectId leak verified by tests.

POST /api/ai/self-suggestion/{dimension} correctly uses DailyBriefRequest(default_factory) pattern so FastAPI accepts empty {} body. Placeholder short-circuits Claude call for empty fields — saves tokens and returns deterministic gentle text.
POST /api/ai/daily-brief has solid defensive fallback in except block returning a full 5-section hardcoded brief on Claude failure — verified format-stable.

Minor enhancement (non-blocking): DailyBriefRequest is reused for both /ai/self-suggestion (where 'note' is meaningful) and /ai/daily-brief (where body is ignored, hence `_: DailyBriefRequest`). Consider renaming to SelfSuggestionRequest or adding a dedicated empty BriefRequest for clarity, but functionally correct.
Minor: /api/ai/self-suggestion returns 200 with error field on invalid_dimension rather than 400. This is intentional (graceful UI), tests assert on it. OK.
Carry-over from prior iters (not in scope): family_models.Holiday.todos still List[dict], routes/family.py missing PUT/PATCH for memories, routes/audio.py hard-coded limit 500.
seed_data_creation: Tests mutate the singleton /api/self-profile document and /api/companion settings; also insert one companion memory for personalisation test. /api/self-profile is reset to empty fields at module teardown effectively via final test. These mutations are expected and idempotent — next run re-runs fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 green. New test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py covers self-profile + AI self-suggestion + daily brief. Full suite now 79 tests, ~3m 48s runtime (AI calls dominate). Claude integration via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is stable; AI responses exceed 100 chars as expected. If adding more AI endpoints, consider the empty-body Pydantic-with-default-factory pattern already established here.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Iter7 features (self-profile CRUD, AI self-suggestion for 5 dimensions, AI daily brief with GROOMING/STYLE/FOCUS/CONNECT/GEAR labels) all behave per spec. Empty-body POST to both /api/ai/self-suggestion/{dim} and /api/ai/daily-brief work correctly thanks to DailyBriefRequest default_factory pattern. No MongoDB _id leakage detected.
